name: Copilot Teams Extension
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure Bot Service
services.purpose: Teams bot framework — message handling, adaptive cards, proactive messaging

enterprise.note: Same SKU, cost scales with compute

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for conversational AI — context-aware responses, task completion, summarization

services.name: Azure App Service
services.purpose: Bot backend hosting — webhook endpoint, message processing, card rendering

services.name: Azure AI Search
services.purpose: Knowledge base search — internal docs, FAQs, policies for grounded responses

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Conversation history — multi-turn context, user preferences, session state

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Bot registration secrets, OpenAI keys, Microsoft Graph API credentials

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Bot analytics — conversation metrics, user engagement, AI quality tracking

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for simple Q&A and routine tasks; escalate to GPT-4o only for complex reasoning
Cache frequent knowledge base queries — 'What is our PTO policy?' doesn't need a fresh AI call each time
Use App Service Free tier for dev — no cost for webhook hosting during development
Implement conversation TTL in Cosmos DB — auto-delete sessions older than 30 days to save storage
Use adaptive cards for structured responses — reduces back-and-forth messages and token consumption
Batch proactive notifications to avoid per-message API costs during mass announcements
